purpose_statements.purpose_statement: This model creates a denormalized view of orders with enriched business metrics including item counts, cost summaries, and customer ordering sequence. domains.description: Core business domain focused on order processing, revenue calculation, product mix analysis, and financial performance metrics.
domains.reasoning: These files share key concepts of order management, revenue reporting, tax compliance, food/drink categorization, and financial calculations. The marts define semantic models for order analytics while staging models prepare transactional data, all connected through order and order_item entities.

domains.description: Domain focused on customer lifecycle analysis, segmentation, lifetime value calculation, and purchasing behavior tracking.
domains.reasoning: These files consistently address customer data transformation and analytics, with staging models cleaning customer data and mart models aggregating lifetime purchasing behavior, segmentation, and customer lifecycle metrics.

domains.description: Domain handling product catalog management, supply chain analytics, inventory tracking, and cost analysis.
domains.reasoning: These files share supply chain and inventory management concepts, with staging models transforming raw supply and product data, and mart models enabling supply chain metrics, product categorization, and inventory analysis.

domains.description: Domain focused on location data management, geographic analysis, and tax rate reporting across different store locations.
domains.reasoning: These files consistently handle location/store data with tax rate reporting and geographic analysis concepts, from staging transformations to mart-level location dimension definitions.

domains.description: Cross-cutting domain for data platform configuration, workflow automation, schema management, and code quality controls.
domains.reasoning: These files serve configuration and infrastructure purposes: project setup, source definitions, workflow automation, code quality, schema governance, and time dimension generation for reporting infrastructure.

semantic_hotspots.purpose: This configuration file defines pre-commit hooks that automatically validate and format code before commits are made, ensuring code quality and consistency across the repository.

semantic_hotspots.purpose: This is the main configuration file for a dbt project named 'jaffle_shop' that defines project metadata, file paths, and model configurations. It specifies how data models should be materialized and sets up environment variables for timezone settings.

model-paths, analysis-paths, test-paths define directory structure
